title: yaaos review final output
description: Final synthesized output of a yaaos-review run. Emitted to stdout and written to final.json in the run's tmpdir.

run_id.description: UUID generated by the orchestrator at run start.

blocker.description: Count of Verified+Plausible Blocker findings in `findings`.

should_fix.description: Count of Verified+Plausible Should-fix findings in `findings`.

nit.description: Count of Verified+Plausible Nit findings in `findings`.

speculative_dropped.description: Count of Speculative findings filtered out before emit. Not present in `findings`.

findings.description: Verified+Plausible findings only, sorted by tuple (severity, confidence, file, line).
